seoTitle: Dartmoor vs Dartnall — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Dartmoor and Dartnall. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dartmoor and Dartnall.
heading: Dartmoor vs Dartnall — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dartmoor, Western Australia and Dartnall, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dartmoor has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Dartnall (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dartmoor or Dartnall safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dartmoor has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Dartnall scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dartmoor scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Dartnall scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dartmoor or Dartnall?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dartmoor has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
